Requirement Description:
Users can view the courses
they are enrolled in
TestObjectives:
Verify the correct course list
based on user identity

Requirement Description:
Users can access a course
and see its classes ordered
by date
TestObjectives:
Check class listing, ordering 
by date, access control

Requirement Description:
Teacher can create a
course with title and
optional image

Teacher can create a class
with details (title, description, 
date/time, files, forum, students)
TestObjectives:
Validate all class fields and 
conditions, check UI elements

Requirement Description:
Student sees class information 
on the dashboard
TestObjectives:
Ensure correct and complete info
display

Requirement Description:
Student can comment if forum 
is enabled
TestObjectives:
Check permission, forum 
activation, successful posting

Requirement Description:
Student can download attached 
class files
TestObjectives:
Validate file presence and 
download functionality

Test audio/video control, session
start/end, chat, student 
management

Validate joining, media stream
handling, chat, request turn

Test valid/invalid emails, duplicates,
 CAPTCHA enforcement

Requirement Description: Users log in to the application
TestObjectives:
Check credentials, error handling,
session creation

Verify changes and impact on
course/class list

Test fields (username, email, password, 
image) and save

Requirement Description:
Teacher adds a course
description with text/ images/ 
links

TestObjectives:
Ensure presence and correctness
of CAPTCHA logic

Requirement Description:
Users access calendar of
their classes
TestObjectives:
Validate calendar population, filtering by 
user and date

Requirement Description:
Teacher adds students via
email(s) or file
TestObjectives:
Test multiple input methods and
error handling
